=== Type A: Mordell (a, b) odd coprime, find x^2 - w^3 small ===
  Target: b^3 / a^3 ≈ 3 + 2√2 ≈ 5.828427
  Equivalently: b / a ≈ (3+2√2)^(1/3) ≈ 1.799632

=== Type C: w=ab, x=w(b-a)/2, y=w(a+b)/2 ===
  x^2 - w^3 = w^2 (b-a)^2/4 - w^3 = w^2 ((b-a)^2/4 - w) = w^2 ((b-a)^2/4 - ab)
  (a, b) coprime Type C with smallest deficit (b-a)^2 - 4ab > 0:
